app.script:
function refresh() state.desc = "Загрузка..."
fetch({ url = "https://api.openweathermap.org/data/2.5/weather", params = { q = "Moscow", units = "metric", lang = "ru" }, authorize = true -- appid из конфига }, function(resp) if resp.status == 200 then local data = json.parse(resp.body) state.temp = math.floor(data.main.temp) state.desc = data.weather[1].description state.humidity = data.main.humidity state.wind = data.wind.speed state.updated = os.date("%H:%M") else state.desc = "Ошибка: " .. resp.status end end) end
-- Загрузка при старте refresh()
